name: Varunprasaath R. Selvaraju, Ph.D.
summary: PhD Chemist and materials scientist with 6+ years of experience in materials characterization, process development, and analytical method development. Expertise in polymer chemistry, thin-film materials, and multi-technique characterization (FT-IR, UV-Vis, TGA, DSC, ellipsometry). Strong background in structure-property-processing relationships, materials failure analysis, and root cause investigation. Proven track record managing laboratory operations and supporting cross-functional projects in materials science research.

education.details: Dissertation: Modular Design and Electrochemical Properties of Xanthene-Based Electrochromic Materials

education.degree: B.S. (Research), Major: Chemistry; Minor: Materials Science

bullets: Lead process development for bio-based polymer systems, applying statistical methods to optimize process parameters and material properties.
Characterized organic and polymer materials using FT-IR, UV-Vis, TGA, DSC, and ellipsometry to establish structure-property relationships.
Investigated material failure modes through systematic root cause analysis and multi-technique characterization.
Developed and optimized CVD-based deposition processes for thin-film materials.

skills.Materials Characterization: FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, ellipsometry, TGA, DSC, NMR, GPC, QCM-D
skills.Materials Science: Polymer chemistry, thin-film materials, surface functionalization, structure-property relationships
skills.Process Development: Process optimization, DOE, CVD processes, scale-up support

projects.title: Bio-based Polymer Process Development
projects.description: Led chemical process development for novel bio-based polymer systems using statistical experimental design.

projects.title: AFOSR Defense Coatings Program
projects.description: Co-led process development for high-performance molecular thin-film coatings for defense optical applications.

publications: Ramasamy Selvaraju, V.; Venta, R.; Rajapaksha, I.; Zhang, J.; Barlow, S.; Salman, S.; Scott, C.; Marder, S. "Narrow-Band Electrochromism of a Ferrocene-Substituted Rhodamine B." Chemistry of Materials, 2025, 37, 5558–5568.

Mandal, J.; Ramasamy Selvaraju, V.; Yan, W.; Divandari, M.; Spencer, N. D.; Dubner, M. "In Situ Monitoring of SI-ATRP Throughout Multiple Reinitiations Under Flow by Means of a Quartz Crystal Microbalance." RSC Advances, 2018, 8, 20048–20055.
